title: The Rugby Awards 2026: Winners
whyMatters: Noticia de actualidad en el sector de deportes.
fullArticle:
The winners from The Rugby Awards 2026, presented by Gallagher, were announced last night at a black tie ceremony at London's iconic Old Billingsgate, screened LIVE on TNT Sports and HBO Max.

PREM Rugby, Premiership Women’s Rugby (PWR), the Rugby Players’ Association (RPA) and England Rugby joined forces to celebrate the very best of the English game across the 2025/26 season.

The full list of awards winners is below:

Gallagher PREM Breakthrough Player of the Season, presented by Defender:

The winners of the Gallagher Player of the Season and Gallagher PREM Breakthrough Player of the Season, presented by Defender, were determined by a vote of PREM Rugby players.

Gallagher PREM Director of Rugby of the Season, presented by London Pride:
